title: Discovery Interfaces
purpose: Design interfaces that guide exploration, serendipity, and visible learning journeys.
rationale: Interface patterns can reduce anxiety and improve discovery quality without over-controlling users.

interface_items.name: trail_feeds
interface_items.purpose: Show what others discovered in related exploration paths

interface_items.name: constraint_playgrounds
interface_items.purpose: Use creative limitation to guide exploration

interface_items.name: breadcrumb_trails
interface_items.purpose: Visualize a user journey across explorations

interface_items.name: discovery_wall
interface_items.purpose: Create visible social proof through moments of surprise
